zh.lifeSummary: 當John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox於1250年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾時，他的父親Malcolm Drummond 7th Thane of Lennox40歲，母親Margaret Mure of Lindsey13歲。他於1279年與Elena Stewart在蘇格蘭斯林史爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1297年登記服兵役。他去世於大約1301年在蘇格蘭斯林史爾德門享年52歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox于1250年出生在英国苏格兰斯林史爾时，他的父亲Malcolm Drummond 7th Thane of Lennox40岁，母亲Margaret Mure of Lindsey13岁。他于1279年与Elena Stewart在苏格兰斯林史爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1297年登记服兵役。他去世于大约1301年在苏格兰斯林史爾德門享年52岁，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Drummond
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from any of various places, notably the barony of Drummond, which is probably identical with the parish of Drymen (Stirlingshire), named from Gaelic drumainn, a derivative of druim ‘ridge’. It has been said that the principal family of this name are descended from a Hungarian nobleman, Maurice, who accompanied Edgar Atheling and his sister Margaret to Scotland in 1068, where she married King Malcolm III. However, there is disagreement on whether or not this was the case.

English: occasionally perhaps from an unrecorded Middle English personal name Dromund (Old Norse Drómundr, apparently from a word denoting a kind of Byzantine galley prevalent till the 12th cent., from Greek dromōn ‘runner’).

variants.name: Drummonds
meanings: Scottish: variant of Drummond , with post-medieval excrescent -s. In Britain this surname is found mainly in County Durham.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox was born in 1250, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Malcolm Drummond 7th Thane of Lennox, was 40 and his mother, Margaret Mure of Lindsey, was 13. He married Elena Stewart in 1279, in Stirlingshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1297. He died about 1301, in Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland, at the age of 52, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox est né en 1250, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Malcolm Drummond 7th Thane of Lennox, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Mure of Lindsey, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé Elena Stewart en 1279, à Stirlingshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1297. Il est décédé environ 1301, à Drymen, Stirlingshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 52 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox 1250 in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Malcolm Drummond 7th Thane of Lennox 40 und seine Mutter Margaret Mure of Lindsey 13. Er hat 1279 in Stirlingshire, Scotland Elena Stewart geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1297 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb um 1301 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox è nato il nel 1250 nel Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Malcolm Drummond 7th Thane of Lennox, aveva 40 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Mure of Lindsey, aveva 13 anni. Lui sposato Elena Stewart nel 1279, nel Stirlingshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1297. Morì circa 1301, nel Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland, all'età di 52 anni, e fu sepolto a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennoxが1250年にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで生まれた時，父Malcolm Drummond 7th Thane of Lennoxは40歳，母Margaret Mure of Lindseyは13歳であった。1279年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアでElena Stewartと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1297年に兵役登録をした。彼は約1301年にスコットランドスティルリングシュアイアドリメンで52歳で死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox(이)가 1250년 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Malcolm Drummond 7th Thane of Lennox(은)는 40세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Mure of Lindsey(은)는 13세였다. 그는 1279년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르에서 Elena Stewart(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1297년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 대략 1301년 스컷랜드 스티를링실르 드리멘에서 52세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox nasceu em 1250, em Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Malcolm Drummond 7th Thane of Lennox, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Mure of Lindsey, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com Elena Stewart em 1279, em Stirlingshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1297. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1301, em Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland, com 52 anos, e foi sepultado em Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox родился в 1250 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Malcolm Drummond 7th Thane of Lennox было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Mure of Lindsey, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени Elena Stewart в 1279 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. В 1297 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер около 1301 г. в местности дримен, стирлингшир, Шотландия в возрасте 52 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия.

sm.from 1278 to 1301: mai le 1278 e o'o I le 1301

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John Drummond 8th Thane Of Lennox nació en 1250, en Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Malcolm Drummond 7th Thane of Lennox, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Mure of Lindsey, tenía 13 años. Se casó con Elena Stewart en 1279, en Stirlingshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1297. Murió aproximadamente 1301, en Drymen, Stirlingshire, Scotland, a la edad de 52 años, y fue sepultado en Scotland.
